population.source_system: Loan Origination System (LOS) decision engine event log
population.extraction_method: Direct query against LOS event log by Internal Audit, credentials not held by the evidence store team.

attestation.method: Extraction performed and hashed by Internal Audit; evidence-store team had no write access to the extract.

anchor.external_system: Internal Audit WORM archive (Object Lock, compliance mode)
Internal Audit WORM archive (Object Lock, compliance mode)

disposition.findings: Record count for the period matches the evaluated population exactly (3,412 evaluated; 3,412 recorded, being 3,050 auto-executed plus 362 routed). Arithmetic reconciliation would have passed. The recorded-population digest did not match the evaluated digest. Comparing manifests identified three decisions evaluated by the LOS between 2026-05-14 and 2026-05-16 with no Evidence Record of any kind, and three records carrying prior-period identifiers re-ingested during a backfill with an incorrect date range. The two errors were equal in number and cancelled in the totals. Root cause: an evidence-store outage during which the LOS continued to evaluate and execute, followed by a corrective backfill that pulled the wrong window. All three missing decisions auto-executed within Band A and none would have required human review; the exposure is evidentiary rather than a routing failure. The organization cannot show, from records alone, why those three proceeded without human review.
corrective_actions: Create reconstructed Evidence Records for the three missing decisions, flagged reconstructed with a stated basis under Assessment Guide 4, and not treated as equivalent to contemporaneous evidence.
Retain the three re-ingested prior-period records in place and issue linked amendment events marking them out-of-period and superseded. Evidence is not deleted; it is corrected in the open.
Implement fail-closed behaviour: the LOS halts auto-execution when the evidence store is unavailable.
Move reconciliation from quarterly to monthly until two consecutive periods reconcile on digest.
Add evidence-store availability to the Envelope's drift indicators and report monthly to the AI Governance Committee.

ownership.owner_role: VP Consumer Credit — Accountable Owner, ENV-CONSUMER-LENDING
